Name: Apprentice
Stats: +2 Melee Damage when you level up +1 Ranged Damage when you level up +1 Elemental Damage when you level up +1 Engineering when you level up -2 Max HP when you level up

Name: Cyborg
Stats: You start with 1 Minigun Ranged Damage modifications are increased by 200% 100% of your Ranged Damage are temporarily converted into Engineering halfway through a wave (1 Ranged Damage = 2 Engineering) Engineering modifications are reduced by 75% Melee modifications are reduced by 100% Elemental modifications are reduced by 100%
Unlocked By: Reach 10 Ranged Damage and get 3 structures at the same time

Name: Generalist
Stats: +2 Melee Damage for every 1 Ranged Damage you have +1 Ranged Damage for every 2 Melee Damage you have You can only equip 3 melee weapons and 3 ranged weapons at a time

Name: Ranger
Stats: +50 Range You start with 1 Pistol Ranged Damage modifications are increased by 50% You can't equip melee weapons Max HP modifications are reduced by 25%
